definitions.text: kunngjøre at det er åpent for å søke, stemme eller lignende
definitions.translation: announce that it is open for applications, voting, or similar

examples.no: stillingen blir lyst ut neste uke
examples.en: the position will be advertised next week

examples.no: regjeringen lyser ut nye blokker for oljeleting
examples.en: the government is announcing new blocks for oil exploration
